elements.label: sec_1
elements.text:
NIIF and Abu Dhabi Investment Authority finalise investment agreement

worth US$1 billion

elements.label: para
elements.text:
Mumbai, 16 October, 2017: The National Investment and Infrastructure Fund (NIF) of India is
pleased to announce the signing of an investment agreement worth US$1 billion with a wholly
owned subsidiary of the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority (ADIA).

elements.label: para
elements.text:
As part of the comprehensive partnership agreement, ADIA will become the first institutional
investor in NIIIF's Master Fund and a shareholder in National Investment and Infrastructure Limited,
the NIIIF's investment management company.

elements.label: para
elements.text:
Sujoy Bose, Chief Executive Officer of NIF, said: "This agreement marks the culmination of an
extensive process of collaboration with ADIA to develop an investment structure that is attractive to
international investors while remaining closely aligned with the NIF's objectives. We are proud to
have ADIA as our founding partner, and grateful for its support and contributions to date, and we
now look forward to announcing further agreements with other investors."

elements.label: para
elements.text:
Khadem AlRemiethi, Executive Director of the Real Estate & Infrastructure Department at ADIA,
said: "The NIIF is set to play an important role in facilitating the flow of foreign capital into India's
infrastructure sector. As a long-standing investor in India and in infrastructure globally, ADIA
welcomes the opportunity to be the first to partner with NIIF in a platform that is sure to be of
interest to other long-term institutional investors."

elements.label: para
elements.text:
NIIF is a fund manager that seeks to create long-term value for domestic and international investors
seeking to invest in energy, transportation, housing, water, waste management and other
infrastructure-related sectors in India. NIIF, an institution sponsored by the Government of India, is a
collaborative investment platform for international and Indian investors. To learn more about NIIF,
visit www.nifindia.in.

elements.label: para
elements.text:
Since 1976, the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority (ADA) has been prudently investing funds on behalf
of the Government of Abu Dhabi, with a focus on long-term value creation.

elements.label: para
elements.text:
ADIA manages a global investment portfolio that is diversified across more than two-dozen asset

classes and sub-categories. With a long tradition of prudent investing, ADIA's decisions are based

solely on its economic objectives of delivering sustained long-term financial returns.
